question:
Will the price of Bitcoin be above $108,000 on November 13?

Description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

Price precision is determined by the number of decimal places in the source.

evidences.title: MicroStrategy Stock and Bitcoin 2025: Dive into Bitcoin's Impact
evidences.content: ### Insights from Industry Experts Analysts remain divided on MicroStrategy’s prospects. Some highlights include unmatched innovation and substantial Bitcoin holdings, predicting massive future returns if Bitcoin adoption increases. Others warn of risks associated with Bitcoin’s volatility and regulatory uncertainties. Bitcoin’s price surged past $100,000 in 2024, driven by the introduction of Bitcoin ETFs and political factors, with predictions of reaching $200,000 by late 2025. Companies like MicroStrategy, holding substantial Bitcoin, could see extreme returns. However, changes in regulations and market fluctuations are crucial factors that may impact these predictions. ## Investing in MicroStrategy [...] MicroStrategy has made headlines with its bold investment strategy in Bitcoin. Consequently, investors are wondering about MicroStrategy’s stock predictions for 2025. Predictions for MicroStrategy stock in 2025 show high variability. Bitcoin holdings heavily influence them. MarketBeat suggests a price range from $409 to $650. The average is $536.90. Stock Analysis forecasts an average target price of $382.10, with a potential reach of up to $650. evidences.title: Bitcoin options open interest for March expiry on Deribit hits record ...
evidences.content: Start Survey Advertisement Over $9.5 billion worth of bitcoin options open interest is set to expire this week on the Deribit cryptocurrency derivatives exchange. This makes Friday's end-of-month expiry one of the largest the leading crypto derivatives exchange has ever seen. "This Friday marks one of the biggest expiries in Deribit's history as $9.5 billion bitcoin options open interest out of $26.3 billion will expire, or 40%," Deribit analysts said in a note sent to The Block. Image 7 The max pain level for Friday's end of month expiry on the Deribit derivatives exchange is $50,000. Image: Deribit. [...] ## More options than usual set to expire in-the-money According to Deribit, out of the $9.5 billion bitcoin options open interest, at a current spot price level of around $70,000, $3.9 billion will expire in-the-money, with a "max pain" price of $50,000. This means that if these options were to be exercised before or on Friday, they would generate a profit, suggesting a significant portion of the options contracts are currently valuable based on the current price of bitcoin. The Deribit analysts added that the present situation implies that a large number of options are profi...

evidences.title: Assets Options Volume & OI - BTC - Laevitas
evidences.content: BTC DERIBIT Open Interest By Strike This chart displays open interest by strike for various expirations. It shows the number of call and put options contracts for each strike price, giving an overview of the distribution of open interest across different price levels. The chart also allows users to see the "max pain" point for a specific expiration when selected. The "max pain" is the strike price at which the total dollar value of options contracts (both puts and calls) that would expire worthless is maximized, often considered the price at which option sellers would benefit the most. BTC DERIBIT Max Pain Vs Index Price BTC DERIBIT Max Pain Vs Index Price [...] Bar chart with 2 data series. The chart has 1 X axis displaying Expiration Date. The chart has 1 Y axis displaying Open Interest (Contracts). Data ranges from 421.8 to 64310.2. End of interactive chart. BTC DERIBIT Open Interest By Expiration This chart displays the open interest for options contracts by expiration date, segmented into calls and puts. The open interest is represented in different formats: contracts, premium, or notional value. The chart helps users to analyze the distribution of open positions across var...

evidences.title: Kline Candlestick Data | Binance Open Platform
evidences.content: Binance Logo Binance Logo # Kline/Candlestick Data ## API Description​ Kline/candlestick bars for a symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time. Kline/Candlestick chart intervals: m -> minutes; h -> hours; d -> days; w -> weeks; M -> months ## HTTP Request​ GET `/dapi/v1/klines` `/dapi/v1/klines` ## Request Weight​ based on parameter `LIMIT` `LIMIT` | LIMIT | weight | --- | | [1,100) | 1 | | [100, 500) | 2 | | [500, 1000] | 5 | 1000 | 10 ## Request Parameters​ | Name | Type | Mandatory | Description | --- --- | | symbol | STRING | YES | After CM migration, accepts both CM and UM symbols. | | interval | ENUM | YES | | | startTime | LONG | NO | | | endTime | LONG | NO | | | limit | INT | NO | Default 500; max 1500. | [...] `startTime` `endTime` `startTime` `endTime` `limit` `endTime` `startTime` `endTime` `endTime` `startTime` `startTime` `endTime` `endTime` `endTime` `startTime` ## Response Example​ `[ [ 1591258320000, // Open time "9640.7", // Open "9642.4", // High "9640.6", // Low "9642.0", // Close (or latest price) "206", // Volume 1591258379999, // Close time "2.13660389", // Base asset volume 48, // Number of trades "119", // Taker buy volume "1.23424865", //...

evidences.title: Market Data Endpoints — python-binance 0.2.0 documentation
evidences.content: Fetch klines for any date range and interval ``` # fetch 1 minute klines for the last day up until now klines = client. get_historical_klines("BNBBTC", Client. KLINE_INTERVAL_1MINUTE, "1 day ago UTC") # fetch 30 minute klines for the last month of 2017 klines = client. get_historical_klines("ETHBTC", Client. KLINE_INTERVAL_30MINUTE,"1 Dec, 2017","1 Jan, 2018") # fetch weekly klines since it listed klines = client. get_historical_klines("NEOBTC", Client. KLINE_INTERVAL_1WEEK,"1 Jan, 2017") ``` ## Get Historical Kline/Candlesticks using a generator Fetch klines using a generator ``` for kline in client. get_historical_klines_generator("BNBBTC", Client. KLINE_INTERVAL_1MINUTE, "1 day ago UTC"): print(kline) # do something with the kline ``` ## Get average price for a symbol [...] ``` agg_trades = client. aggregate_trade_iter(symbol = 'ETHBTC', start_str = '30 minutes ago UTC') # iterate over the trade iterator for trade in agg_trades: print(trade) # do something with the trade data # convert the iterator to a list# note: generators can only be iterated over once so we need to call it again agg_trades = client. aggregate_trade_iter(symbol = 'ETHBTC', '30 minutes ago UTC') agg_trad...

evidences.title: Bitcoin rallies above $100K, here's a look at the seasonality impacts
evidences.content: # Bitcoin rallies above $100K, here's a look at the seasonality impacts ## Yahoo Finance 1510000 subscribers 19 likes ### Description 862 views Posted: 14 May 2025 About Yahoo Finance: Yahoo Finance provides free stock ticker data, up-to-date news, portfolio management resources, comprehensive market data, advanced tools, and more information to help you manage your financial life. - Get the latest news and data at finance.yahoo.com - Download the Yahoo Finance app on Apple ( or Android ( - Follow Yahoo Finance on social: X: Instagram: TikTok: Facebook: LinkedIn: [...] [Music] Bitcoin's rally has resumed in recent days, nearing those old January all-time highs. So, what is next for the cryptocurrency? Let's take a look at seasonality. I'm Jared Blickery, host of Stocks and Translation. Well, first, our seasonality definition here. This is a predictable and recurring change in data that tends to happen at the same time every year. And the emphasis is tends to. uh it's not a guarantee and it counts for about onethird of price action if everything goes well but twothirds of the time life can intervene and we saw that this year in April when stocks which were supposed to be going up...

evidences.title: Bitcoin Price - History, Chart, 5 Years, 10 Years, Halving
evidences.content: ## What is Bitcoin's all-time high price record? November 2021 saw Bitcoin's all-time high price record, around $69,000. This milestone captures the rising institutional interest in blockchain technology as well as their acceptance. But Bitcoin's volatility means its price might vary greatly, hence investors have to exercise great caution. The price swings of Bitcoin rely on several elements, including market mood, laws, and more general state of the economy. Investing in Bitcoin presents hazards even if it presents chances. Before investing, one should investigate carefully and get financial guidance. [...] Supply and Demand: As with most assets, Bitcoin's price is heavily influenced by supply and demand dynamics. Reduced supply (e.g., halving events) generally pushes prices up if demand remains constant or grows. Market Sentiment: Public perception and investor sentiment play a significant role in Bitcoin's price volatility. Positive news, institutional adoption, and new regulatory frameworks can drive demand, while negative news can lead to sharp declines. Institutional Adoption: Increasing interest from institutional investors, hedge funds, and businesses accepting Bitcoin p...

evidences.title: Bitcoin Price History and Historical Data | CoinMarketCap
evidences.content: Bitcoin's price history is a testament to its evolution and growth over the years. It started with a value of almost nothing and has grown to be one of the most valuable assets in the world. The price history shows a pattern of sharp rises followed by corrections, reflecting the volatile nature of the cryptocurrency market. It also shows periods of stability, indicating growing acceptance and use of Bitcoin. The price history is a reflection of Bitcoin's journey, from being a fringe asset to becoming a mainstream financial instrument. ### How Has Bitcoin's Market Cap History Shaped Its Perception in the Financial World?

evidences.title: JPMorgan analysts remain bullish on Bitcoin despite market volatility
evidences.content: JPMorgan analysts remain bullish on Bitcoin despite recent crypto-market volatility. They argue that deleveraging may create a path for more stable institutional accumulation and suggest Bitcoin could recover and strengthen into 2026, with potential for a new all-time high.
evidences.query: Bitcoin price outlook November 2025 analyst report research note Glassnode CoinShares Kaiko JPMorgan preceding month

evidences.title: Grayscale Research discusses Bitcoin drawdowns and longer-term outlook
evidences.content: Grayscale Research compares Bitcoin pullbacks with historical drawdowns and argues that such volatility can be consistent with prior bull-market behavior. The commentary says the outlook is uncertain but suggests the four-year cycle thesis may be incorrect and that Bitcoin could potentially make new highs next year.
